entry_rule: BUY debit call spread near mid on pullback day (trend up).
exit_rule: TP: sell at 50% max profit (spread≈3.67); SL: sell if spread≤1.17 OR close<EMA21 (≈45.85); Time-stop: exit by 21 days.

entry_rule: SELL credit call spread near mid on pullup day (trend down).
exit_rule: TP: buy back at 50% max profit (spread≈0.12); SL: buy back if spread≥0.48 OR close>EMA21 (≈52.31); Time-stop: exit by 21 days.
